subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the light of Divine existence! The attributes of munificence, generosity, bounty and benevolence, when manifest in human reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستضای از نور وجود الهی صفت جود و بخشش و عطا و احسان وقتی در حقیقت انسان
subcodes.subjects: @generosity [kirama], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
